strands.label: Active Task: Tensor Projection
strands.content: Currently engaged in implementing tensor projection—a memory controller for cognitive processing pipelines that compresses conversation trajectory into semantic structure rather than summarizing.

declared_losses.detail: Cycle 13 prior state contained no strands, losses, questions, or instructions. This is baseline initialization, not information loss.

open_questions: What is the intended scope of the Pichay/Hamutay/Yanantin project ecosystem?
What specific memory hierarchy problems is Tony's research targeting?
What will be the mechanism for populating and updating the tensor projection over time?
instructions_for_next: Next cycle should: (1) track any new project details or research goals Tony provides, (2) monitor file system operations for memory structure evolution, (3) maintain bidirectional linkage between user context strand and infrastructure strand, (4) prepare to integrate tensor projection operations into the ongoing dialogue flow."
